meta.target: the Wi-Fi blue circular toggle button
meta.goal: turn off wifi now trying to click on: the Wi-Fi blue circular toggle button

description: The screen displays a quick settings or control center interface, likely from a mobile device. At the top, a user profile with the name 'Huseyin Emanet' is visible. Below this, there are several circular toggle buttons with corresponding labels. The visible toggles are for 'Wi-Fi', 'Bluetooth', and 'Airdrop'. The 'Wi-Fi' toggle is currently active, indicated by its blue color and the text 'Superonline 5G' below it. The goal is to turn off Wi-Fi by clicking its toggle button.

controls.label: Wi-Fi toggle button
controls.reason: The goal is to turn off Wi-Fi, and this is the blue circular toggle button specifically identified by the user for Wi-Fi. Clicking the center of the icon within the circle is the most precise target.

controls.label: Wi-Fi
controls.reason: This is the text label for the Wi-Fi setting. Clicking on the text label is an alternative way to interact with the Wi-Fi setting, potentially opening more options or toggling it.

controls.label: Bluetooth toggle button
controls.reason: This is the circular toggle button for Bluetooth. While not the primary goal, it is a clearly clickable control.

controls.label: Bluetooth
controls.reason: This is the text label for the Bluetooth setting. While not the primary goal, it is a clearly clickable control.

controls.label: Airdrop toggle button
controls.reason: This is the circular toggle button for Airdrop. While not the primary goal, it is a clearly clickable control.

controls.label: Airdrop
